title: TCM Sales Manager
description:
Location: Modern Shopping Mall right across Somerset MRT

Work days: 5 days work week = 3 weekdays (9.30am – 7.30pm) + Saturday, Sunday (10am – 7pm)


As a Clinic Sales Manager, your primary responsibility is to introduce suitable treatment and wellness packages for patients' healing journey. You will play a key role in supporting the clinic's daily sales and operations, handling patient care and administrative duties, and contributing to marketing and outreach efforts along with training new staff — all while upkeeping a warm, professional, and healing environment.


This role requires a mature and reliable individual who takes pride in their work, handles responsibilities with professionalism, and contributes positively to the team and clinic environment.


Your Key Responsibilities are:

1. Sales & Service Consultation (Primary Focus)

  • Recommend suitable treatment packages and wellness products based on patient needs and clinic offerings.
  • Maintain great understanding of therapy benefits to confidently present and close treatment plans.
  • Provide clear advice to build trust and long-term patient relationships.

2. Patient Experience & Front Desk Support

  • Greet and attend to patients with warmth and professionalism.
  • Schedule and manage patient appointments, follow-ups, and therapy sessions.
  • Handle payment processing, issue receipts, and maintain accurate daily sales reports.

3. Clinical & Therapeutic Support

  • Assist in therapy sessions as needed.
  • Support TCM Physicians in delivering care, treatments, and consultations.
  • Ensure treatment rooms are clean, well-stocked, and prepared for each patient.

4. Customer Relations & Communication

  • Respond promptly and professionally to patient inquiries, feedback, and concerns across phone, email, and other channels.
  • Maintain a high level of customer satisfaction through consistent, empathetic service.

5. Marketing & Clinic Engagement

  • Participate in marketing campaigns and community engagement events, including health talks, trade fairs, and roadshows.
  • Collaborate with marketing teams and Key Opinion Leaders (KOLs) to promote clinic services.

6. Inventory & Hygiene Management

  • Conduct monthly stock checks and maintain sufficient supplies of clinic consumables.
  • Oversee the cleanliness of reception areas, waiting rooms, pantry, and treatment areas, upholding clinic hygiene standards.

7. Operations & Team Support

  • Adhere to clinic policies and standard operating procedures.
  • Step in to support colleagues or adjust workdays when necessary for business continuity.
  • Take initiative to solve problems and maintain a smooth clinic environment.

8. Performance & Culture

  • Demonstrate strong sales ownership while upholding service quality.
  • Remain professional and committed, ensuring personal matters do not interfere with work responsibilities.
  • Foster a dependable, respectful, and collaborative team culture.


We are interested in candidates, who are ideally:

  • Sales-oriented, with some interest in health, wellness, and patient care
  • Emotionally mature, self-motivated, and able to perform consistently without micromanagement
  • Able to commit to weekends and work schedule as stated
  • Prior experience in healthcare, wellness, or service-focused environments is an advantage
  • Comfortable with strong TCM herbal scents
  • Must be a dependable team player, pro-active and willing to step in when needed


Salary, title and other details are for reference and may not reflect the final offer.

postedCompany.description:
Natural Healings is an Integrated Pain Management and Preventive Care Specialist Group providing Chiropractic, Physiotherapy and Clinical Sports Massage

 

Mission

To provide trusted, high-quality and consistent clinical pain management care to our patients, empowering them to lead an active, mobile and pain-free life.

 

Our Vision

To be a world-class clinical facility offering high quality preventive pain management care with our core focus and belief of delivering wellness through non-surgical and non-drugs approach
postedCompany.name: NATURAL HEALING PTE. LTD.
